target_0.brief_supporting_logic: The target is a vehicle with its roof completely caved in, chassis exposed, and all major structural components collapsed and charred; this represents 100 percent of the target element area damaged.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is completely consumed by fire with no discernible structural integrity; all major components are charred and fused together; no repairable parts visible.

target_2.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is completely charred with no discernible structural integrity; all major components are melted or consumed by fire; consistent with catastrophic (K-kill) damage.

summary: Two military equipment targets and one building target are assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence. The scene depicts a road with multiple vehicles completely burned and structurally collapsed, with soldiers standing nearby. The functional impact is likely severe, as all assessed targets are rendered non-operational and appear to have been destroyed by catastrophic force.
